title: Horoscope
profTagline: Your sign's real daily reading — yesterday, today and tomorrow — with the day's star ratings, from horoscope.com. Cached on your device, so the last reading stays readable offline. Pick your sign once; the stars do the rest.
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
offline: Offline — showing the last saved reading.
noConnection: No connection. Check the network and try again.
signDates: Mar 21 – Apr 19|Apr 20 – May 20|May 21 – Jun 20|Jun 21 – Jul 22|Jul 23 – Aug 22|Aug 23 – Sep 22|Sep 23 – Oct 22|Oct 23 – Nov 21|Nov 22 – Dec 21|Dec 22 – Jan 19|Jan 20 – Feb 18|Feb 19 – Mar 20
